page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

The underlying AMD EPYC processor includes 32 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache. It supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 (with VNNI and BF16 extensions) and cryptography accelerations such as AES and SHA_NI. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and memory bandwidth consistently rank in the average tier.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local storage. The dedicated CPU allocation and high single-core performance make it suitable for in-memory databases like Redis, which achieved 11.25 million SET operations per second in testing, as well as database operations, static web serving, and memory-bound enterprise applications. The hardware profile offers a balanced resource density for memory-heavy tasks without the overhead of bundled local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 8.0 GB of memory per core and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU resources. The processor supports AVX-512 and AES cryptography extensions, delivering top-tier single-core performance alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and strong single-thread execution, the ecs.r8ae.2xlarge is well-suited for memory-bound workloads, database operations, and in-memory caching platforms like Redis.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 processor with 8 physical cores at 3.4 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing a high 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and database operations
